# Anju Redheendran

> Healthcare informatics executive, life coach, and author. RN, BSN, MBA, CLC.
> Founder & CEO of ICU-1111 ("Intensive Care for the Soul").

Anju Redheendran is a healthcare informatics executive with experience across
Oracle Cerner and Epic implementations spanning 78+ hospital deployments at
Tenet Healthcare. She is also a mindset strategist and life coach who helps
workaholics, people-pleasers, and perfectionists navigate the storms of their
lives with dignity — by teaching them to read what their body has been trying
to say about their past, so they can stop performing as the only version of
themselves that so many people need and expect them to be, and finally make
room for who they actually are.

Her core clinical differentiator is the mind-body-identity connection: the
body communicates what the mind refuses to process. This framing is clinically
grounded, adjacent to psychoneuroimmunology — clients report measurable
outcomes including physician-noted physical health shifts.

## Core frameworks

- **The PAST Framework** — a model for understanding how past wounds shape
  present patterns, across four dimensions: The Pairing, The Audition, The
  Squeeze, The Tank.
- **The DEAL Framework** — a companion model for building the capacity to
  move forward: Don't Resist Reality, Embrace Discomfort, Adjust Your
  Perspective, Level Up.

## Book

- *I'll Have What SHE's Having!* (August 2024) — available on Amazon
  (ASIN B0DF5T4Q23)
